OntologyVersionResolvingService.name: Ontology annotation based version
OntologyVersionResolvingService.description: Versions the ontology based on ontology annotations.

form.title: Resolve ontology version from annotations
form.description: Select the annotation properties that should be used to determine the version and version IRI of the ontology. OntoPuS will resolve new values for specified properties on each ontology release, it is the responsibility of the ontology author to change the values before releasing a new version.

version.title: Version
version.description: The version of the ontology e.g. 1.2.3 ([semantic versioning](https://semver.org/)), 2024-06-01 (date based versioning) or other preferred version scheme.

versionIri.title: Version IRI
versionIri.description: The version IRI of the ontology. Unique IRI for this specific ontology version.

GeneralVersioningService.name: User defined version
GeneralVersioningService.description: Accepts user defined text as version.

DateVersioningService.name: Date based version
DateVersioningService.description: Uses current date as the version (YYYY-MM-DD).
